reason: Backend spec index and pre-development checklist for M11
M11 logs/metrics must avoid raw high-cardinality tag labels
M11 adds a tag governance module and API endpoints while preserving layer boundaries
M11 spans storage, validation, suggestions, search, API, CLI, and UI
M11 should reuse ManualMetadata, manual_library, tag_suggestions, and M10 bulk validation
M11 remains file-backed and must use atomic writes under the manual library root
M11 policy validation and rewrite failures must use structured service errors
Repo-specific code context for M11 tag governance
